backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.) and exposing shared functions for user management, bookings, services, Stripe payments, and access-controlled admin operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single feature (updating DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx with hardcoded 10-table schema cards) to its test ID, affected files, and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each page, component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jeevan HealthCare React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration that declares all application routes (public, admin, phlebotomist, doctor) and wraps the app with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a sidebar navigation menu; guards access by checking authentication and admin/lab-executive roles, redirecting unauthorized users to the home page.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentRemin: React component that schedules and displays appointment reminder toasts at 24-hour, 3-hour, and 1-hour intervals before an appointment, and conditionally shows a 'Join Video Call' button 15 minutes before online consultations.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Provides the doctor portal shell with a sidebar navigation menu; guards access by verifying the doctor role and shows an access-denied card with role details if the user lacks permission.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Renders a doctor listing card with avatar, star rating, consultation mode badges, availability indicator, and a 'Book Now' button using MockDoctor data.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer displaying the Jeevan HealthCare brand, quick navigation links, service links, and contact information with social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with top emergency bar, logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart badge, and Internet Identity authentication with role-based dashboard routing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and conditionally renders ProfileSetupModal when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Provides the phlebotomist portal shell with a sidebar containing Dashboard and My Collections links; redirects unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the home page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects name, email, and phone from a newly authenticated user and saves a default patient UserProfile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SlotCalendar.tsx: Interactive monthly calendar component for selecting appointment dates, disabling past dates and supporting month navigation.
frontend/src/components/SlotLockTimer.ts: Displays a countdown timer showing how long a selected appointment slot is held, with urgent styling when under 60 seconds remain.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyAccordi: Renders an accordion UI listing 16 medical specialty categories (e.g., Primary Care, Cardiology) with their specialists, allowing users to expand categories and select a specialist, which triggers navigation or a callback.
frontend/src/components/TimeSlotGrid.tsx: Displays a grid of 30-minute appointment time slots from 9 AM to 7 PM, marking slots as unavailable, locked, selected, or available based on props and a deterministic mock unavailability function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence managing a shopping cart of lab tests/packages, exposing actions to add, remove, and clear items plus computed totals for price, MRP, and savings.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering services, user profiles, admin/role checks, bookings, patients, doctors, and health packages. Each hook uses `useActor` to access the canister actor and conditionally enables queries when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlotLock.ts: Custom hook that manages a timed slot lock with a 5-minute countdown, providing `lockSlot`, `clearLock`, the locked slot value, and remaining seconds. Uses an interval ref to decrement the timer and auto-clears on expiry or unmount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS layers and defines CSS custom properties for the Jeevan brand color palette in both light and dark modes. Also adds utility classes for brand-specific text, background, and border colors.
frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts: Exports a `MockDoctor` interface and a `MOCK_DOCTORS` array containing static mock data for multiple doctors, including specialty, fees, availability, and bio. Used as shared test/demo data across doctor-related pages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` for React Query and `InternetIdentityProvider` for authentication wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page for Jeevan HealthCare, displaying a hero section, mission/vision cards, company story, and core values with icons. Layout is purely presentational using static content and Tailwind/shadcn UI components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: An admin CRM page for managing sales leads with status tracking (new, contacted, inProgress, converted, lost), search/filter, and add/edit lead dialogs using mock data.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: An admin page for managing customers with full CRUD operations, search filtering, and a details dialog that shows associated patients, backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: An admin dashboard overview page that displays key operational metrics (orders, users, phlebotomists, reports) as stat cards fetched via the useDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: An admin order management page that lists all customer bookings with address, service description, preferred date, and budget, fetched via the useAllBookings hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: An admin page for managing patients with CRUD operations, search filtering, vitals display, and a form to add patients linked to existing customers, backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page for managing test reports, displaying mock data with verified/pending statuses and options to view or verify each report.
Admin page that fetches and displays all diagnostic services/packages in a card grid, showing name, category, and active status.
Admin page that fetches and lists all system users in cards, displaying their role (with icon), active status, email, and phone.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for managing patient vitals with search/filter, a table view, and a dialog to add new vitals using CRUD mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Displays a booking confirmation summary after a successful appointment booking, including doctor info, date/time, fee, and action buttons for starting online consultation, tracking home visits, or post-consultation actions.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step lab test booking form collecting patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then submits the booking and clears the cart on success.
frontend/src/pages/BookSlotPage.tsx: Page for selecting an appointment date and time slot for a specific doctor, with slot locking timer and navigation to patient details form. Reads consultation type and fee from query params and passes them forward.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the user's lab test/package cart with item details, pricing, savings, and a checkout button that navigates to the booking page.
Allows the user to select a consultation type (online, clinic, or home visit) for a doctor, calculates the total fee with travel, corporate, and subscription discounts, then navigates to the slot booking page.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays the Jeevan HealthCare contact page with cards for phone, WhatsApp, email, address, and social media links, plus an embedded Google Map section.
frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.ts: Renders a visual reference page showing the platform's database schema as styled cards with table names, column names, data types, and PK/FK badges.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Doctor analytics page showing performance metrics (completed consultations, rating, total patients, success rate) fetched from the dashboard stats hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Doctor appointments page with day/week/month view toggle, listing appointments with accept, cancel, and complete actions via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Renders the doctor's teleconsultation interface with video/audio/chat controls and a tabbed SOAP notes form for documenting patient consultations.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Displays the doctor's personalized dashboard with quick stats (appointments, prescriptions, earnings, rating) fetched via React Query hooks, including loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Shows the doctor's earnings summary (total, pending, monthly) and a detailed earnings list fetched from an API, with an export statement button and tabbed breakdown view.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Provides a help and support page for doctors with quick-link cards for training, compliance, and support tickets, plus an FAQ accordion and a contact support form.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Displays a searchable list of the doctor's patients fetched via React Query, showing patient details like name, gender, blood group, and relationship with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Doctor profile settings page with four tabs (Profile, Qualifications, Availability, Settings) allowing doctors to update personal info, education, schedule, and notification preferences.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorConsultationPag: Doctor consultation listing page with search, specialty accordion filter, sort options (rating, fee, experience, availability), and a grid of DoctorCard components linking to individual doctor profiles.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx: Specialty-specific doctor listing page that filters MOCK_DOCTORS by URL param specialty, supports search and sort options, and navigates to doctor profile on booking.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Interactive health tools page featuring a symptom checker (multi-select symptoms with rule-based analysis) and a vitals tracker tab with progress indicators and status badges.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page displaying quick service shortcuts, health packages (fetched via API), and a 'Why Choose Us' section with tabs and FAQ-style toggles.
frontend/src/pages/HomeVisitTrackingPage: A real-time home visit tracking page that animates a doctor's position on a map, counts down ETA, and provides in-page chat and call modal features.
frontend/src/pages/OnlineConsultationPag: A simulated video consultation page with mock audio/video controls, in-session chat, file upload, and a prescription builder with download preview.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Lists mock lab test orders with status badges and allows filtering by all, active, or completed tabs, with navigation to individual order tracking.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Displays a static timeline of lab order statuses (from booking to report ready) for a given order ID fetched from route params.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDetailsPage.ts: A multi-field form page for collecting patient details (type, demographics, symptoms, file uploads) before proceeding to payment for a doctor consultation.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page that displays a fee breakdown (consultation, travel, GST, discount) and lets users select a payment method (UPI, card, net banking, wallet, pay-at-home) before confirming a booking and navigating to a confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Displays a phlebotomist's assigned sample collections for the day, showing patient name, address, scheduled time, test names, status badges, and a Google Maps navigation button.
Phlebotomist dashboard showing four summary metric cards (total, completed, in-progress, and pending collections) derived from the useSampleCollections hook.
Post-consultation page shown after a booking is complete, offering action cards for downloading a prescription, ordering medicines, booking lab tests, scheduling a follow-up, and rating the doctor.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePa: Public doctor profile page that displays a doctor's details (ratings, specialization, consultation modes, availability) fetched by ID, with a button to book a consultation.
frontend/src/pages/RatingReviewPage.tsx: Rating and review page where patients can submit a star rating, written review, and recommendation for a doctor after a consultation, with a success state on submission.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page that lists mock verified lab test reports with order details and provides a button to download each report as a PDF.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Dynamic service detail page that renders content (title, intro, included services, target audience, benefits) for different service slugs such as doctor consultation, medicine delivery, lab tests, and diagnostics.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: A diagnostic tests catalog page where users can browse, search, filter, and add lab tests to a cart, with support for prescription upload and profile setup modal integration.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom Jeevan brand colors (oklch variables), typography, container queries, animate plugins, and custom font families.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 41) describing the Jeevan HealthCare app's full architecture, tech stack, feature list, known issues, and completed feature history for build planning continuity.
